name: nanokvm-mcp
description: MCP server for controlling NanoKVM devices
long_description: Control a NanoKVM device from Claude: power the target machine on/off, cycle power, send keyboard and mouse input, capture screenshots of the HDMI output, mount and unmount ISO images, and read device and hardware status. This bundle targets Windows and runs the server on the system Python interpreter.

tools.name: nanokvm_power
tools.description: Press the target machine's power button (short, long, or reset)

tools.name: nanokvm_power_cycle
tools.description: Force off, wait, then power on the target machine

tools.name: nanokvm_led_status
tools.description: Read the power and HDD LED status

tools.name: nanokvm_hdmi_status
tools.description: Get HDMI connection status and resolution

tools.name: nanokvm_send_text
tools.description: Type text on the target machine via keyboard emulation

tools.name: nanokvm_send_key
tools.description: Send a single key press with optional modifiers

tools.name: nanokvm_tap
tools.description: Tap at a specific screen position

tools.name: nanokvm_click
tools.description: Click a mouse button, optionally at a position

tools.name: nanokvm_move
tools.description: Move the mouse cursor to an absolute position

tools.name: nanokvm_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the mouse wheel up or down

tools.name: nanokvm_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a JPEG screenshot of the target display

tools.name: nanokvm_list_images
tools.description: List available ISO images on the device

tools.name: nanokvm_mount_iso
tools.description: Mount an ISO image as CD-ROM or USB disk

tools.name: nanokvm_unmount_iso
tools.description: Unmount the currently mounted ISO image

tools.name: nanokvm_mounted_image
tools.description: Get information about the mounted ISO image

tools.name: nanokvm_reset_hid
tools.description: Reset the HID keyboard and mouse devices

host.title: NanoKVM Host
host.description: Host or IP of the NanoKVM device, with optional port (e.g. 192.168.1.50 or 192.168.1.50:8080)

screen_width.title: Screen Width
screen_width.description: Target display width in pixels, used for mouse/tap coordinates

screen_height.title: Screen Height
screen_height.description: Target display height in pixels, used for mouse/tap coordinates

use_https.title: Use HTTPS
use_https.description: Connect to the NanoKVM over HTTPS instead of HTTP

verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL Certificate
verify_ssl.description: Verify the device's TLS certificate when using HTTPS
